title: Product Landing Page
description: Clean product showcase video. Hero shot, feature highlights, pricing CTA. Modern, minimal, sales-driven.
prompt: Open with a hero product shot. Reveal 3 key features with clean animations. Close with pricing and CTA. Every frame should sell. No filler.
cut_style: Dmytryk clean cuts. Each shot stays as long as it takes to communicate the feature. No wasted frames. Substance over style.
